name: P-10 router behavior: router-set --dry-run does not modify router.yaml (§2.14 contract)
command: snap=$(sha256sum "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/router.yaml" | cut -d" " -f1); bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/router-set.sh" --task-class test-class --model haiku --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ "$snap" = "$(sha256sum "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/router.yaml" | cut -d" " -f1)" ] && echo dry_safe 1>&2
